---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem in a template, checklist, doc, or example.
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the problem clearly.

## Affected file or workflow

Link or name the affected file, template, checklist, doc, or example.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Open or use the affected template.
2. Follow the relevant workflow.
3. Note where the problem appears.

## Expected behavior

Describe what should happen.

## Actual behavior

Describe what happens instead.

## Safety or privacy impact

State whether this issue could cause unsafe side effects, missing human confirmation, weak rollback guidance, privacy exposure, or secret leakage.

## Suggested fix

Describe the smallest practical change, if you have one.

## Additional context

Add screenshots, snippets, or links only if they do not contain private information, secrets, customer data, or internal project details.
